name: Oysters Rockefeller
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the oysters and remove them from their shells; drain the oysters.
2. Wash the shells.
3. Place each oyster in a deep half of its shell.
4. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a custard cup over medium heat for 30 seconds.
5. Stir in parsley and onion, then spoon over the oysters.
6. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and paprika.
7. Top each with 2 teaspoons of spinach.
8. Dot each with 1 teaspoon of the remaining butter.
9. Arrange the shells on a bed of rock salt around an edge of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish.
10. Cook, covered, over medium-high heat for 5 to 6 minutes or until done, giving the dish a half turn once.
11. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
Makes 4 servings.
Total cooking time: 5 minutes and 30 seconds.
